summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW Simplified P&L and Balance Sheet system completed. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). All 12 navigation tabs working. Frontend UI verified for P&L (month filter, expense breakdown) and Balance Sheet (assets, liabilities, capital, net worth calculation).

issues: Minor: Expense breakdown only shows 2 categories from by_category (Supplies, Salary) but breakdown has more (other, interest_paid, chit_fund). This is because by_category comes from expenses collection while breakdown comes from transactions.

passed_tests: GET /api/reports/simple-profit-loss - All Time (no filter)
GET /api/reports/simple-profit-loss?month=2026-01 - With month filter
GET /api/reports/simple-profit-loss?month=2026-03 - Current month
P&L expense categories validation
GET /api/reports/simple-balance-sheet - Structure validation
Balance Sheet assets section (cash_balance, debtors, advances_to_staff, chit_fund_investment, interest_receivable)
Balance Sheet liabilities section (creditors, salaries_payable)
Balance Sheet capital section (net_worth, chit_fund_won)
Balance Sheet equation: Assets = Liabilities + Capital (Net Worth)
Balance Sheet debtors list (parties with positive balance)
Balance Sheet creditors list (parties with negative balance)
All 12 navigation tabs working (Dashboard, Staff, Attendance, Salary, Cash Book, Party Ledger, Byaj, Expenses, Reports, Chit Fund, P&L, Balance Sheet)
P&L correctly sums income (credit transactions) and expenses (debit transactions)
Net Profit calculation: Income - Expenses
Net Worth calculation: Assets - Liabilities
P&L month dropdown with All Time option
P&L expense breakdown with progress bars
Balance Sheet shows debtors list with names and amounts
Balance Sheet shows creditors list with names and amounts
Balance Sheet formula info box in Hindi
Data integration: Transactions affect P&L totals
Data integration: Advances reflected in Balance Sheet
Data integration: Chit Fund investments reflected in Balance Sheet
critical_code_review_comments: Simplified P&L correctly aggregates from transactions collection (credit=income, debit=expense)
Simplified Balance Sheet correctly aggregates from: transactions (cash balance), parties (debtors/creditors), advances, chit_funds, interest_accounts
Net Worth = Assets - Liabilities (by definition in simplified system)
Balance Sheet is always balanced because Net Worth is calculated as difference
Month filter working correctly on P&L page
All 12 navigation tabs accessible and working
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data from previous tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplified P&L and Balance Sheet system fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_simple_reports.py cover: Simple P&L API (with/without month filter), Simple Balance Sheet API (assets, liabilities, capital, equation), Navigation tabs, Data integration. Previous complex accounting tests in test_proper_accounting.py are for the OLD system that user rejected. The NEW simplified system works without vouchers - it directly aggregates from cash_book transactions, expenses, party_ledger balances, advances, chit_funds, and interest_accounts.

assets.interest_receivable: Sum of principal_amount from active interest_accounts

capital.chit_fund_won: Sum of won_amount from won chits
